education.description_pt: Bacharelado em Engenharia de Software com MEC 5/5. Cursos principais: Banco de Dados, Algoritmos e Programação, Arquitetura de Computadores, Redes de Computadores, Inteligência Artificial, Machine Learning.
education.description_en: Bachelor's in Software Engineering with MEC rating 5/5. Key courses: Database, Algorithms & Programming, Computer Architecture, Computer Networks, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning.
education.description_es: Licenciatura en Ingeniería de Software con MEC 5/5. Cursos principales: Base de Datos, Algoritmos y Programación, Arquitectura de Computadoras, Redes, Inteligencia Artificial, Machine Learning.
education.description_fr: Licence en Ingénierie Logicielle avec note MEC 5/5. Cours principaux: Base de données, Algorithmes et Programmation, Architecture Informatique, Réseaux, Intelligence Artificielle, Machine Learning.
education.description_zh: 软件工程学士学位，MEC 评分 5/5。主要课程：数据库、算法与编程、计算机架构、计算机网络、人工智能、机器学习。

education.description_pt: Foco em desenvolvimento de software. Tecnologias: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs, Git.

education.description_fr: Focus sur le développement logiciel. Technologies: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs, Git.
education.description_zh: 专注于软件开发。技术：JavaScript、TypeScript、React、Tailwind CSS、REST APIs、Git。
